title: Nordic RCC — flow-based capacity calculation data (via JAO)
description: Nordic flow-based capacity-calculation results and related transparency data, surfaced by the Nordic Regional Coordination Centre (Nordic RCC). The operational parameters (e.g. CNECs, flow-based domains) are published through the JAO publication tool on behalf of the Nordic TSOs and Nordic RCC, with related data on the ENTSO-E platform and the Nordic Unavailability Collection System (NUCS). Highly relevant to flow-based market-coupling research. EDiT links only.

publisher.name: Nordic RCC / JAO (on behalf of Nordic TSOs)

distribution.format: Web publication tool (JAO) + linked transparency platforms
distribution.note: Nordic RCC's Data & Tools page is a hub: flow-based capacity-calculation parameters are published via the JAO publication tool (operated by JAO for the Nordic TSOs and Nordic RCC); related data is on the ENTSO-E Transparency Platform and NUCS (nucs.net). No single open licence is stated -- confirm reuse terms before redistributing. A de-anonymisation mapping table for historical CNEC data and the JAO Publication Handbook are linked from the Nordic RCC Data & Tools page.

variables: Flow-based capacity-calculation results: critical network elements and contingencies (CNECs), flow-based domain parameters, and capacity results across day-ahead/intraday/long-term/balancing timeframes. Definitions in the JAO Publication Handbook, maintained upstream.
